content.en:
"Supreme Kunwu, how is the destruction of the abyss?"

Ye Tian asked.

He had been in the Origin Realm all this time, so he didn't have time to ask about the situation of the Abyss Shattered, and now he naturally wanted to know.

"It's suppressed for the time being!" Kunwu Supreme said: "However, the losses of the Ten Thousand Races have been serious, many Supremes have fallen, and our Terran Race has also fallen two ordinary Supremes!"

"What!"

Ye Tian's expression changed.

There are not many supremes of the human race, and the loss of two people at once is definitely a huge loss!

"Yes, our human race has suffered a serious loss, not only two supremes, but also six celestial supremes, plus many masters. However, compared to some of the great races, the loss of our human race is still good, and some of the great races of the universe have lost almost half of the supreme!"

Kunwu Supreme sighed.

Ye Tian didn't speak, and stood silently.

After a while.

Kunwu Supreme said: "You ancestors of the human race, there is no need for you cosmic gods to guard here for the time being!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, Ye Tian returned to the Terrans.

-----------

Terran, Holy City.

After Ye Tian returned to the Heavenly Pavilion, the people in the Heavenly Pavilion were very excited.

Before that, they were really worried that Ye Tian would fall, after all, there were too many cosmic gods who had fallen during this time, and even the Juggernaut, Tianzun, and Supreme had all fallen and died.

But now, Ye Tian is back, and the pillars of the Heavenly Pavilion are back, so they are naturally relieved.

Once Ye Tian fell, the strength of the Heavenly Pavilion would drop by more than one level, and it might even be expelled from the Holy City.

Therefore, Ye Tian's return is too important to them.

The inner sanctum of the Heavenly Pavilion.

"Husband, why can't I contact you during this time?"

Xiao Yue asked Ye Tian.

"I've entered the Origin Realm, so you can't contact me!"

Ye Tian said about his entry into the Origin Realm, and Xiao Yue suddenly realized.

During this time, the battle situation was very tragic, she was really worried about Ye Tian, so she went to contact Ye Tian, but she couldn't get in touch, if she didn't know that Ye Tian hadn't fallen, otherwise it would really collapse.

But even if she knew that Ye Tian had not fallen, she was always worried.

Now that Ye Tian is back, she breathes a sigh of relief.

Next, Ye Tian told Xiao Yue about his situation during this period of time, and summoned his war pet from the small universe.

"Wow, that's a terrible source beast! This is what you call the source ancestor cub - the two-horned round bear!"

Xiao Yue stared at the two-horned round bear, unable to take her eyes off it.

"Yes, it is a sixth-order life, and it is also a primordial cub, and it is born with an unimaginable advantage in physical body cultivation. It's just that it's very average in other aspects, but as long as enough resources are invested, it's enough to cultivate Xiao Yuanyuan!"

Ye Tian affirmed.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went to retreat.

This time, he's going to hit the Domination Realm.

His accumulation at the cosmic god level was enough, and many exercises and secret techniques had been cultivated to the limit, and it was difficult to continue to improve.

Therefore, he must impact the Domination Realm in order to be able to progress faster.

The location of Ye Tian's retreat chose the edge of the Terran territory, that is, the edge of the universe.

Here, after Ye Tian retreated for a few months, he began to impact the Domination Realm.

The cosmic god impacts the realm of domination, in addition to the talent requirements, there is only one requirement, that is, the fusion of essence and spirit, control the heaven and the earth, and thus transform his own small universe.

The essence and spirit represent a person's body, divine power, and soul, and if a certain aspect is too weak, it will be difficult to break through to the realm of domination.

Therefore, cultivators who are at the limit of the cosmic gods, even if their cultivation talent meets the requirements, they will do their best to improve their souls and physical bodies.

Of course, in this cosmic era, it is difficult for a strong person above the god level to improve in terms of physical body, and it can even be said that it cannot be improved, but it does not mean that it cannot improve the strength of physical body.

The vast majority of cosmic god extreme powerhouses need to cultivate a secret technique that temporarily increases the strength of their physical bodies, so as to achieve the unity of essence and spirit, and impact to the realm of domination.

But Ye Tian is a person who is against the sky, and his physical strength far exceeds the imagination of other cultivators, so he doesn't need to cultivate that secret technique, he can directly impact the master realm.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's essence and spirit began to merge in the underworld, giving birth to a source power that poured into the small universe.

Then, Ye Tian's small universe began to transform, becoming bigger and stronger.

Moreover, Ye Tian's small universe was gradually born into vitality, which was a situation that had not been seen before.

Click!!

The shackles between the cosmic god and the master were shattered, and countless energies poured into Ye Tian's body, helping him to transform.

"Not enough energy!"

Ye Tianming.

Immediately, he took out a large number of Chaos Crystals and various rare and rare resources, and threw them into his own small universe one after another, helping the small universe to completely transform, and also helping himself complete the promotion and leap!

Time passed little by little -

this day.

Ye Tian stood up, his aura had far surpassed before, not only his physical body had increased many times, but even his soul and divine power had also increased many times.

Because his Hades Secret Book was also promoted at the same time, reaching the realm of Hades.

This time it can be said that double happiness is coming!

Thundered!!!!

In the Endless Void, a thundercloud covering the infinite territory descended.

A trace of the aura of the law of thunder emanated, enough to make any master tremble.

"The Dominator-level Thunder Tribulation is coming!"

Ye Tian looked up at the thundercloud and muttered.

Compared to the Thunder Tribulation that was promoted to the Universe God, the Dominator-level Thunder Tribulation was not known to be many times stronger, but Ye Tian had nothing to worry about.

"From the situation of the Twelve Cosmic Eras, it is said that the Thunder Tribulation at the Dominating Level is a little different, and the power of the Thunder Tribulation seems to have changed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, no matter how much he changes, he is fearless.

If he can survive the tribulation and fail, no one else will be able to succeed.

Rumble!!!

The first thunder tribulation came, and Ye Tian easily shook it.

The second thunderstorm!

The third thunder tribulation!

......

Under the thunderstorm after thunder, Ye Tian was very relaxed, and he didn't use any strength at all.

It didn't take long for the eighteenth thunder tribulation to come, and it still didn't cause any trouble to Ye Tian.

"The Nineteenth Thunder Tribulation is not as good as the previous Thunder Tribulation, and the power will increase several times! Some powerful Heaven Rebels have basically fallen on top of the Nineteenth Thunder Tribulation of the Dominator Level!"

Ye Tian thought back to the information he had gotten and thought to himself.

Rumble!!!

The Nineteenth Thunder Tribulation appeared.

However, this time the situation of the thunder tribulation was not a thunder pillar, but a ...... Figure!

I saw that the humanoid was completely made of the rules of thunder, holding a thunder spear, like a thunder god of war, falling from the sky and rushing towards Ye Tian.

"Sure enough, the Nineteenth Thunder Tribulation is the Origin of the Universe that draws the battle consciousness of some ancient existences from the long river of time and space and condenses it into the power of the Thunder Tribulation, forming a Thunder God of War, whose combat power is enough to rival some powerful sons of the era, and this blow is equivalent to the desperate killing move of the sons of the dominant era. Under normal circumstances, even if some weaker Heaven Rebels have reached the level of the Son of the Era, they will not be lightly injured when resisting the previous Thunder Tribulation, and because they have just broken through to the Domination Realm, their combat effectiveness is not strong, so they can't stop this move at all!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But he didn't panic at the moment, only to see him holding a spear and fiercely facing the thunder spear of the Thunder God of War.

The spear in Ye Tian's hand was not a real spear, but a consummation-level Hell Divine Sky Spear, which was a space supernatural power of the Consummation Realm!

"Broken!"

Ye Tian roared lightly.

Tear it up!

The Thunder God of War was directly shattered by Ye Tian, and he easily killed the other party in seconds.

"The Nineteenth Thunder Tribulation is still too weak!"

Ye Tian smiled faintly.
